ddls:
CREATE TABLE "options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option contract */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the underlying stock */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the option */,
  "strike_price_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the strike price */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the option */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of option (call or put) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the option */,
  "delta" REAL /* Delta of the option */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma of the option */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta of the option */,
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price */,
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volatility */,
  "interest_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interest rate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_interest_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("interest_rate_id") REFERENCES interest_rates ("interest_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES underlying_assets ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_volatility_id FOREIGN KEY ("volatility_id") REFERENCES volatility ("volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_stock_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("stock_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES option_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the option type (call or put) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the option type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "stock_price" REAL /* Stock price at a given timestamp */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volatility" (
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility entry */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility at a given timestamp */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the volatility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volatility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_rates" (
  "interest_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest rate entry */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate at a given timestamp */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interest rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "underlying_assets" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option contract */,
  "delta" REAL /* Delta of the option */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma of the option */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta of the option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option contract */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the historical data */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the option at the given timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytic_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytic model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the analytic model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "model_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model result entry */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option contract */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytic model */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analytic model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES analytic_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each option contract

Name of the option type (call or put)
Unique identifier for each stock price entry

Unique identifier for each volatility entry
